allergy_warning: Paracetamol allergy is rare; if you had a reaction, avoid and inform doctor.
age_restrictions: Safe in children at correct dose by weight; avoid in infants under 2 months without doctor advice.
pregnancy_safety: Generally considered safe in pregnancy at recommended doses; discuss with doctor.

contraindications: Previous severe allergic reaction to amoxicillin or penicillin
allergy_warning: Do not use if allergic to penicillin or other beta-lactam antibiotics. Cross-reactivity with cephalosporins possible.
age_restrictions: Used in all ages; dose by weight in children. Consult doctor for infants.
pregnancy_safety: Category B - generally considered safe; used commonly in pregnancy. Discuss with doctor.

contraindications: Severe kidney impairment (dose reduction may be needed)
allergy_warning: Rare allergy to cetirizine; if you had reaction to antihistamines, inform doctor.
age_restrictions: Not recommended under 2 years without doctor advice; 2–5 years use lower dose.
pregnancy_safety: Category B - limited data; use only if clearly needed. Discuss with doctor.

contraindications: Hypersensitivity to omeprazole or other PPIs
allergy_warning: If allergic to omeprazole, avoid other PPIs (pantoprazole, etc.) unless advised by doctor.
age_restrictions: Used in adults and children over 1 year; dose varies. Consult doctor for long-term use in children.
pregnancy_safety: Category C - use only if benefit outweighs risk. Discuss with doctor.

contraindications: Hypersensitivity to pantoprazole or other PPIs
allergy_warning: If allergic to pantoprazole or other PPIs, inform doctor.
age_restrictions: Used in adults and children (dose by weight); long-term use in children only under doctor supervision.
pregnancy_safety: Category B - generally considered acceptable; discuss with doctor.

contraindications: Known QT prolongation or certain heart rhythm disorders
allergy_warning: Do not use if allergic to azithromycin or other macrolides (e.g. erythromycin).
age_restrictions: Used in children; dose by weight. Safe in infants for specific indications under doctor care.
pregnancy_safety: Category B - generally considered acceptable when needed; discuss with doctor.

allergy_warning: Rare allergy; if you had muscle pain or weakness on another statin, inform doctor.
age_restrictions: Used in adults and adolescents (e.g. 10+ years for familial hypercholesterolemia). Not for young children.
pregnancy_safety: Contraindicated in pregnancy - stop before planning pregnancy. Do not use while breastfeeding.
